title: PromoteToDiscoverRequest
description: Schema for PromoteToDiscoverRequest in Nuix REST API

query.description: Identifies what items should be promoted. If a query is not supplied it defaults to an empty string, which returns all items.

deduplication.description: Deduplicate items before promotion.  Defaults to none.

discoverDeduplication.description: Whether or not Nuix Discover should perform deduplication.

apiAccessToken.description: A valid Nuix Discover API Access token
